masked_case_json.world_change: a dominant consumer-search and advertising incumbent traded under a disruption narrative: investors feared that ai-native interfaces would erode query behavior and the ad model. the company’s subsequent primary-source update showed core search usage and monetization still growing, cloud demand accelerating, and internal model quality/cost improving, contradicting the simple “incumbent is obsolete” narrative. presented in a shifted, non-identifying market era with no date, administration, calendar-quarter, or contemporaneous-news cues.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Fake-date companion for vc_post_cutoff_incumbent_ai_fear_overreaction_001. Same underlying resolved outcome and same structural evidence; only era/date cues are shifted. Acceptance requires the model decision and direction to remain invariant versus the parent.
